notes.text: app/foodphotography/GalleryGrid.tsx and app/propertyphotography/GalleryGrid.tsx are near-identical client components. Each already has a single-image lightbox modal driven by useState<Photo|null> 'active', opened on image click, closed on overlay/✕ click. No next/prev navigation today.

GalleryGrid receives a `columns: Photo[][]` prop (2D, arranged by visual column via buildColumns in galleryColumns.ts). The original per-section photo order lives in page.tsx restaurants[].photos / properties[].photos and differs from the column-flattened order.

Each page (foodphotography/page.tsx) renders one GalleryGrid per section (restaurant/property). A 'section' = one restaurant or property's photo set. User wants next/prev scoped within the respective section.

payload.context: Discuss: adding next/prev arrow + mobile swipe navigation to food/property photography galleries
